spec_match.rationale: The registry, generated loader, custom probe, and live CSS editor all use the exact `CSS.supports('at-rule(@name)')` / `@supports at-rule(@name)` support-query shape from the feature.

interactive.rationale: The loader now includes registry action buttons, generate/reset/load-all controls, a missing-support simulation toggle, a custom at-rule input, and a live CSS editor.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (container, features, generate, load, loader, missing, only, paste, polyfill, polyfills, ready, rule, script, supports).

edge_cases.rationale: The page now has an explicit edge-case mode that simulates missing `CSS.supports` and forces all rows through the fallback loader path, plus invalid custom-input handling.

references.rationale: References section cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link directly.

design_system.rationale: All button background overrides have matching text colours, and the new controls use design-system variables.

summary: The polyfill loader now demonstrates the exact at-rule support query, includes richer controls, and explicitly exercises fallback behavior when support detection is missing or a custom at-rule is unsupported.
